ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genetic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the genetic data entry */,
  "number_invariant_sites" INTEGER /* Number of invariant sites in the dataset */,
  "number_invariant_excluding_ambiguous" INTEGER /* Number of invariant sites excluding ambiguous data */,
  "max_block_length" INTEGER /* Maximum length of invariant blocks */,
  "max_block_length_excluding_ambiguous" INTEGER /* Maximum length of invariant blocks excluding ambiguous data */,
  "max_pairwise_difference" INTEGER /* Maximum pairwise difference in the dataset */,
  "max_pairwise_difference_excluding_ambiguous" INTEGER /* Maximum pairwise difference excluding ambiguous data */,
  "min_pairwise_difference" INTEGER /* Minimum pairwise difference in the dataset */,
  "min_pairwise_difference_excluding_ambiguous" INTEGER /* Minimum pairwise difference excluding ambiguous data */,
  "number_invariable_block" INTEGER /* Number of invariable blocks */,
  "number_invariable_excluding_ambiguous" INTEGER /* Number of invariable blocks excluding ambiguous data */,
  "segregating_sites" INTEGER /* Number of segregating sites */,
  "theta" REAL /* Theta statistic for the dataset */,
  "tajima_d" REAL /* Tajima's D value for the dataset */,
  "tajima_pi" REAL /* Tajima's Pi value for the dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the dataset */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the species */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the study */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the genetic data */,
  "ambiguous_data_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of ambiguous data in the dataset */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the genetic data entry was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the genetic data entry was last modified */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the genetic data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "collection_site" TEXT /* Geographical location where the sample was collected */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the population the sample belongs to */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the individual from which the sample was collected */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., blood, saliva, tissue) */,
  "preservation_method" TEXT /* Method used to preserve the sample */,
  "sample_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the sample */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the sample */,
  "collector_name" TEXT /* Name of the person who collected the sample */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample entry was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES populations ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "populations" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population */,
  "population_name" TEXT /* Common name of the population */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the population's characteristics */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area the population inhabits */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions of the population */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Size of the population */,
  "genetic_diversity_index" REAL /* Index of genetic diversity within the population */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the population entry was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the population entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* References the genetic data entry analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., diversity, structure) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the analysis */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Current status of the analysis */,
  "analysis_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "analysis_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the analysis in seconds */,
  "analysis_version" TEXT /* Version of the analysis */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who created the analysis */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis entry was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES genetic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the platform (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Affiliated institution of the user */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who created the account */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
